name: Balthus

acts.description: Painted explicitly sexualized images of prepubescent girls throughout his career
2017 MoMA petition demanded removal of Thérèse Dreaming, a painting of a child in a sexualized pose

behavior_summary: Spent his career painting young girls in explicitly sexual poses. His work hangs in MoMA. There is significant ongoing debate about what that means.

art.summary: Technically accomplished figurative painter whose work occupies major museum collections. The subject matter is the problem.

accountability_events: 2017 public petition demanded MoMA remove Thérèse Dreaming

verdict.blurb: He spent sixty years painting children in sexual situations and the art world called it a meditation on adolescence. MoMA still has it on the wall. The little girl he kept photographing in Thérèse Dreaming was a real child named Thérèse.
